notes: v389 — 🗑 Delete buttons removed. The 'delete holding' and 'delete closed trade' buttons have been taken out everywhere — the holding cards, the trade history, and the ⋯ menu on desktop. To exit a position use 💵 Sell (or ✂ Sell part); to reverse a recorded sale use ↩ Undo on that trade in History. Nothing else changes. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
